VAL-ANAL-001.summary: Agent performance stats table displays correctly with 3 agents showing completed (2,1,1), in-progress (0,1,1), total tasks (6,3,2), avg completion time (N/A), and success rate (66.7%, 33.3%, 50%)

VAL-ANAL-002.summary: Task completion metrics show Total Tasks=11, Completion Rate=36.4% (4/11), Avg Time to Completion=0m. Status distribution bars display all 6 statuses: backlog(2), ready(1), in_progress(2), review(1), done(4), blocked(1)

VAL-ANAL-003.summary: Time tracking section shows Created→Claimed=0m (8 tasks measured) and Claimed→Completed=0m (4 tasks measured). Both metric cards present with correct values.

VAL-ANAL-004.summary: CSV export button downloads valid CSV file (mission-board-export-2026-03-14.csv, 2273 bytes) with 11 headers (ID,Title,Description,Status,Task Type,Project,Agent,Requires Approval,Created At,Updated At,Claimed At) and 11 task data rows with resolved project/agent names.

VAL-ANAL-005.summary: JSON export button downloads valid JSON file (mission-board-export-2026-03-14.json, 5865 bytes) with 11 enriched task objects including projectName and agentName fields.

VAL-ANAL-006.summary: Three charts render correctly: donut chart (240x240) for task status distribution, bar chart (558x280) for agent comparison, and line chart (1175x280) for velocity over time. All have actual drawn pixel content.

VAL-ANAL-007.summary: Project filter correctly reduces visible tasks from 11 to 7 (Alpha Project) and updates agent stats. Date range filter correctly updates analytics API calls and shows 0 tasks for future date. Clear button resets all filters and restores original data.
